description_long: This house is a large, stately residential building surrounded by a manicured yard and a perimeter fence. The structure features a combination of flat and slightly pitched roofs, with multiple wings and a central section that appears to be the main living area. The exterior is finished in a dark gray color with white trim, and numerous windows are arranged in mostly symmetrical rows across the facade. Mature trees and landscaped greenery are distributed around the property, providing shade and privacy. The main entryway is marked by a prominent path leading to a set of steps and a covered porch, flanked by columns and decorative elements. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and traditional architectural influences, with a focus on spaciousness and curb appeal.
description: A large, elegant house with dark gray walls, white trim, symmetrical windows, and landscaped grounds, featuring a prominent entry path and a mix of flat and pitched roofs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry path, central porch with columns, and symmetrical window arrangement, framed by trees and a fenced yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard area, additional wings, and more private landscaping, with less emphasis on the main entry.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length of the house, extensive windows, and a secondary entrance or garden area.
description_view_3: Side view revealing the depth of the property, garage or service entrance, and a mix of greenery and paved surfaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry path with steps, covered porch, columns, and decorative trim
